name: Captivating Chorus

miss: As [AttackerName] speaks, the scantily clad performer artistically twirls while lasciviously running her hands up and down her curvy body, pendulously swinging her hips and bust side to side while smoothly singsonging lyrics that echo hauntingly in [TargetName]'s mind, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to shake off the seductive captivation!
